title: New System.AI library, System.ML overhaul, record types, and faster runtime

items: New System.AI library (-lib ai or @ai) — graph search (Dijkstra, AStar, BreadthFirst, DepthFirst), game search (Minimax with alpha-beta, MonteCarloTreeSearch), metaheuristics (GeneticAlgorithm, SimulatedAnnealing, HillClimbing) and tabular RL (QLearning, Sarsa, MDP value iteration); all stochastic algorithms seeded for reproducible runs

System.ML overhaul — 13 new estimators (Ridge/Lasso/ElasticNet, Perceptron, SVM, PCA, GaussianNaiveBayes, AdaBoost, DBSCAN, GaussianMixture, KDTree, RegressionTree, GradientBoostedTrees); real recursive DecisionTree and voting RandomForest; k-means++ KMeans; NeuralNetwork bias support; seedable System.ML.Random; uniform Fit/Predict/Score/Store/Load API. Breaking: RandomForest->Train is now Fit; stored NeuralNetwork models must be regenerated
New record types — record Point { @x : Int; @y : Int; } generates the constructor and accessors; readonly records omit setters; supports generics, inheritance and member overrides
Compiler: Tail Call Optimization (TCO) — self-recursive tail calls rewritten to jumps, eliminating stack growth (-opt s1+)
Compiler: Loop-Invariant Code Motion (LICM) — hoists arr->Size() reads and pure arithmetic out of loop bodies (-opt s2+)
VM: Auto-JIT now compiles methods containing MTHD_CALL after 10 invocations (5-15% speedup across benchmarks)
VM: Extended interpreter fast-path with 15 additional inline opcodes (comparisons, bitwise, shifts, logical)

Fixes: VM traps reading interpreter locals no longer crash auto-JIT methods (AMD64/ARM64); bool array literal pooling; float equality on array elements; library aliases (@std/@ml/@game/@ai) documented
Performance: bench_matrix_multiply -14%, bench_dead_code -15%, bench_array_intensive -12%, binarytrees -7%, mandelbrot -6%
Code generation optimized to eliminate redundant labels
Added trim front and back to the 'System.String'
Refactored the 'Collections.Stack' class to be list vs. array based
Support for strings in select statement
